title: rubus hirtus var. oblongus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. oblongus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a plant species in the rose family native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus hirtus var. oblongus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
